label: Keeper's Sleep Niche
description: Keeper's Sleep Niche is a compact bedroom compartment partitioned from the Ashlight Keeper's Quarters by riveted sheet-metal and a tight-sealing gasketed bulkhead. A narrow cot is set into a recessed alcove above a shallow drain pan tied into the quarters’ grated washdown floor, with built-in lockers bolted flush to the wall. Violet-glass sconces fix the space in bruise-colored light, while copper grounding straps and hanging chains track along the low ceiling baffles to bleed off Vespera Tertius’ electrostatic charge. A shuttered vent with layered grit-filters provides controlled airflow, maintaining the quarters’ sealed, ash-cold discipline.
